title: Master COA Phase 2 — disclaimer & classification rules
content:
DISCLAIMER: VAT/TDS/tax accounts are for AI training only. Verify with IRD, ICAN, ASB, Finance Act, qualified CA before real posting.
Numbering: 1000s Assets, 2000s Liabilities, 3000s Equity, 4000s Income, 5000s COGS, 6000s Expenses.
Ambiguity rules: advance-to-supplier (1009) vs advance-from-customer (2002) — ask who paid whom. Cash (1001) vs eSewa/Khalti/Fonepay wallets — never conflate. On overlap, ask clarifying question rather than guess.
Tax accounts (1011, 2003, 2004): flag for CA confirmation, never assume rate.
source: Nepal SME Master COA Phase 2 (AI Training — verify tax with IRD/CA)
